records.display_name: L line traction power upgrades enabling capacity increase

payload.claim_text: This increase in capacity is enabled by recent upgrades to the line's traction power system, including three new substations
payload.subject: L line

records.display_name: Peak and off-peak guideline load values

payload.claim_text: Peak period guideline load is 145 passengers/car. Off-peak guideline load is 53 passengers/car.

records.display_name: A line crew unchanged

payload.claim_text: The number of crews required for A service would be unchanged
payload.subject: A line

records.display_name: L weekday one additional crew

payload.claim_text: Weekday service on the L would be increased by a total of four round trips, and one additional crew would be required
payload.subject: L line

records.display_name: L Saturday service changes

payload.claim_text: On Saturdays, we are proposing to shift four trips from the early morning to late evening hours. This would extend the span of 8-minute headways through the 11 p.m. hour, while maintaining headways of 8 minutes or less through the affected morning hours.
payload.subject: L line

records.display_name: A line midday service extension

payload.claim_text: On the A line, we are proposing to keep additional trainsets in service through the midday by adding one roundtrip each to Lefferts Blvd and Far Rockaway, which would extend the span of midday 8-minute average headways between Inwood-207 St and Rockaway Blvd
payload.subject: A line

records.display_name: L Sunday service changes

payload.claim_text: On Sundays, we are proposing to shift the span of peak 4-minute service two hours earlier, with service reaching the 4-minute headway in the 11 a.m. hour.
payload.subject: L line

records.display_name: Weekend schedule adjustments cost neutral

payload.claim_text: The weekend schedule adjustments are cost neutral
payload.subject: weekend L line schedule adjustments

records.display_name: L weekday PM peak shift

payload.claim_text: In the weekday PM peak period, we are proposing to shift the span of 4-minute headways approximately 30 minutes earlier
payload.subject: L line

records.display_name: L weekday peak changes

payload.claim_text: Weekday AM peak period service would be increased by four additional round trips total, with two additional trains at the height of the AM peak to increase service from 20 to 22 trains between approximately 8 a.m. and 9 a.m.
payload.subject: L line
